init       Generates a the necessare product files that can create an SPFx
cmponent.
pack       Creates an spfx file from folders in disc.
help       Display more information on a specific command.
version    Display version information.

options.name: --name
options.description:
Required. Sets the product name that is
visible in app site collection.

options.name: --tenant-wide-installation
options.description:
Sets the configuration flag that the product
can be installed tenant wide.

options.name: --application-customizer
options.description:
Required. Creates an application customizer
configuration.

options.name: --source-folder
options.description:
Required. Sets the source folder of web resource
files (html, js, css)

options.name: --spfx-folder
options.description:
Sets folder that the spfx zip package will be
generated

options.name: --debug-folder
options.description:
Sets the debug folder that the spfx component will
be generated. Defaults to ./dist/debug.

options.name: --templates-folder
options.description:
Sets the template folder that will get the base
files for generation. Defaults to
./Templates/Creation.
